patents.title: Portable Music Production Apparatus
patents.continuityChain: CIP of application No. 17/368,865 filed Jul. 7, 2021 (now abandoned)
patents.technologyField: Electronic musical instrument controllers and portable MIDI control devices for music production
patents.problemSolved: Traditional MIDI keyboards are expensive, bulky, and lack portability. Virtual solutions lose tactile feedback.
patents.coreSolution: Portable device with pitch bend and assignable modulation via any suitable single connection type. NOT restricted to USB-only, NOT limited to modulation-only processing.
patents.keyComponents: Pitch bend control; Assignable modulation control; Controller; Single connection (USB, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Ethernet, Thunderbolt, FireWire, MIDI, NFC, TOSLINK, S/PDIF); Optional macro controls; Optional aftertouch
patents.advantages: Highly portable; Simple and cheap to manufacture; Maintains tactile feedback; Connection-agnostic; No compromise on expressive control

claims.text: Portable apparatus with pitch bend and assignable modulation via any single connection. BROADER than granted parent: no USB restriction, no modulation-only limitation, no no-other-connections clause
Claim 11 (NEW) â€” Specifies USB as optional dependent feature, not mandatory

patents.scopeComparison: Significantly broader than parent: (1) any connection replaces USB-only, (2) removes modulation-only limit, (3) removes no-other-connections restriction
patents.familyRole: First child â€” CIP broadening the original granted patent claims

patents.title: Portable music production apparatus
patents.technologyField: Electronic musical instrument controllers and portable MIDI control devices for music production
patents.problemSolved: Traditional MIDI keyboards are expensive, bulky, and lack portability. Virtual solutions lose tactile feedback.
patents.coreSolution: A dedicated USB-connected portable device providing physical pitch bend and assignable modulation controls without generating primary audio signals.
patents.keyComponents: Pitch bend control (spring-loaded); Assignable modulation control; Controller processing only modulation and after-effect signals; USB as sole external interface; Optional macro controls; Optional force-sensitive aftertouch
patents.advantages: Highly portable; Simple and cheap to manufacture; Maintains tactile feedback; Plug-and-play via single USB; No compromise on expressive control
patents.examinerReasons: Allowed for: (1) controller processing only modulation/after-effect signals without primary audio, (2) no connections besides USB

claims.text: Portable apparatus with pitch bend and assignable modulation, USB-only connection, processes only modulation and after-effect signals

patents.citedPriorArt: US 5,850,051 A (Machover 1998); Behringer SWING (2020); Korg opsix Mod Wheel (2021); M Audio Oxygen Pro (2021)
patents.familyRole: Root patent â€” original filing in the Moye controller family
